periodDays.title: Period Days
periodDays.description: Days to look back for trend data (default 30)

storeId.title: Store ID
storeId.description: Salesforce Record ID of the RetailStore. Provide this when the user is on a store record page. Takes priority over Store Name.

storeName.title: Store Name
storeName.description: Name of the retail store as mentioned by the user in conversation (e.g. "Metro Hypermarket"). Used when Store ID is not available.
